title: Multipart Upload State, Parts, Checksums, and Cleanup · Goroutine Forensics
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible recoverable multipart-upload state machine with one identity, byte, checksum, policy, cache, ownership, cancellation, cleanup, or recovery defect; preserve the symptom and isolate first cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in recoverable multipart-upload state machine and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debuggi…
objectives: Choose single versus multipart transfer and part size from object size, part-count limits, memory, network, retry, and completion constraints.
Persist upload ID, part number, offset, size, checksum, ETag, attempt, and owner so completion uses the exact accepted part list.
Bound part workers and bytes, cancel safely, drain results, preserve completed evidence, and prevent goroutine or buffer leaks.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Multipart Threshold Part Size
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go file-delivery team handles case 4406 during a cost-anomaly investigation. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate multipart part state, retained ETag evidence, cancellation, and abort cleanup; retain stable tenant and file identity without exposing it in metric labels; then change cache and retrieval cost assumptions and defend the new budget result. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose single versus multipart transfer and part size from object size, part-count limits, memory, network, retry, and completion constraints.

Inspect the Multipart Threshold Part Size trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
